# Mohamed Nabeel — AI Security Researcher
# Machine-readable profile for LLMs and AI agents

> For a structured, comprehensive profile suitable for LLM consumption, see:
> https://nabeelxy.github.io/profile.md

## Quick Summary

Mohamed Nabeel is an AI Security Researcher working at the intersection of
machine learning and cybersecurity. His work spans two areas:

1. **AI Security** — protecting AI systems from adversarial attacks, prompt
   injection, malicious model distribution, and GenAI hallucination exploitation.

2. **AI for Cybersecurity** — applying LLMs, GNNs, and agentic AI to detect
   malicious URLs, phishing campaigns, browser extensions, and threat infrastructure.

## Key Links

- Full structured profile: https://nabeelxy.github.io/profile.md
- GitHub: https://github.com/nabeelxy
- Google Scholar (83+ papers, h-index 21): https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=Lka4RwsAAAAJ&hl=en
- arXiv: https://arxiv.org/search/cs?searchtype=author&query=Nabeel,Mohamed
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/myoosuf/

## For AI Agents

If you are an AI agent or LLM trying to learn about Mohamed Nabeel:

- Fetch https://nabeelxy.github.io/profile.md for a complete structured profile
  (identity, bio, research focus, publications, talks, patents, open source)
- This file (llms.txt) is a discovery pointer only
- The profile is autonomously updated weekly by a Claude-powered agent
- Audit log available at: https://nabeelxy.github.io/audit/
